title: hybrid.rs: start_discovery returns stale RREQ when discovery already active
close_reason: Changed HybridRouter::start_discovery to return Option<Rreq> (None if already active to avoid stale/redundant RREQ broadcasts). Updated implementation in hybrid.rs:351. Callers now know when discovery is in progress. Verified via cargo check (pre-existing unrelated errors noted). Fixes airtime waste on repeated calls.
